summary: Landing page website for 'Growth Byte Digital' digital marketing agency. Built with HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript. Features navy blue/white/yellow color theme, smooth scrolling nav, hero section with CTA, services cards, about section, why choose us section, contact form with WhatsApp button, and footer. Support phone: 6265381119, support email: gbdigital@gmail.com. User has provided a logo image to incorporate.
architectural_notes: Single-page HTML/CSS/JS website — no frameworks or build tools
Color theme: Navy blue, white, and yellow
User provided a custom logo image to be used in the site
known_issues: Logo image not displaying correctly in navbar/footer
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Re-export the logo with a transparent background and optimized for web use (WhatsApp Image 2026-02-15 at 12.15.01 AM.jpeg > logo.dim_512x512.png)

existing_features.title: Save the uploaded logo image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png and display it in the navigation bar replacing any text-only agency name placeholder. The logo should be sized appropriately for a navbar (height ~48px) and also appear in the footer alongside the agency name text.
Update all instances of the support phone number to 6265381119 and support email to gbdigital@gmail.com across the ContactSection, Footer, and any other components that display contact information.

Save the uploaded Growth Byte Digital logo image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png (overwriting any existing file), then fix all components that reference this logo (Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, AboutSection.tsx) so the image renders correctly. Ensure the src attribute uses the correct relative public path '/assets/generated/logo.png', the alt attribute is set to 'Growth Byte Digital', the image has explicit height/width constraints appropriate for each context (height 48px in Navbar, height 60px in Footer, larger display size in HeroSection and AboutSection), and object-fit is set to 'contain' so the logo is never cropped or distorted.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update contact details: support phone 6265381119 and email gbdigital@gmail.com in the contact form/footer
